hero.tagline: Fair elections. Verifiable results. Built for organisations that cannot compromise on trust.
hero.sub: End-to-end encrypted, audit-ready, tamper-resistant elections for organisations of any size. Built for universities, enterprises, and public institutions.

liveResults.title: Watch
liveResults.sub: Follow vote counts in real time when organizers enable live results — or view certified outcomes after polls close. No login required.

features.title: Everything you need for
features.sub: A complete platform built for security, transparency, and scale.

items.title: Military-grade encryption
items.desc: AES-256 end-to-end encryption helps keep every vote private and tamper-resistant from cast to count.

items.title: Real-time audit logs
items.desc: Administrative actions can be logged for review so oversight teams have a clear accountability trail.

items.title: Multi-role platform
items.desc: Purpose-built dashboards for admins, election creators, and voters — each with the right level of access.

items.title: Live countdown & results
items.desc: Real-time tallies when enabled, progress indicators, and published results after polls close.

items.title: Secret voter ID system
items.desc: Unique voter credentials support anonymous, duplicate-free participation across elections.

items.title: Enterprise security monitor
items.desc: Optional MFA, session review, and account security tools to protect high-stakes elections.

how.title: How it works in
how.sub: From setup to results in minutes — no technical expertise required.

steps.title: Create your election
steps.desc: Set up title, dates, candidates and voting rules with our guided form.

steps.title: Invite voters
steps.desc: Share secret voter IDs via email or CSV upload. Voters register securely in minutes.

steps.title: Cast votes securely
steps.desc: Voters authenticate and cast anonymous encrypted ballots during the voting window.

steps.title: Get instant results
steps.desc: Live charts when enabled, winner summaries, and audit-ready reports after close.

items.name: Dr. Amara Osei
items.quote: FortressVote transformed how we run student elections. The transparency and security gave our community confidence in the results.

items.name: James Whitfield
items.quote: We ran a large-scale election without a single integrity issue. Audit logs gave our oversight committee complete confidence in the outcome.

items.name: Priya Sharma
items.quote: The secret voter ID system is brilliant. Board elections stay anonymous yet auditable — setup took under thirty minutes.

cta.badge: Free to start — no credit card needed
cta.title: Ready to run your first
cta.sub: Join organisations that trust FortressVote for their most important democratic decisions.

footer.desc: A secure election management platform. Built for transparency, designed for trust.
